visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair in pigtails, wearing a red bucket hat and a white long-sleeved shirt over a black fuzzy vest, stands in a brightly lit warehouse aisle. She holds two large red-and-white cans of soup, smiling broadly at the camera with high energy. In the background, floor-to-ceiling shelves are packed with consumer goods, specifically canned food items. (2) The camera zooms in slightly as she holds the cans closer to the lens. Her hands move excitedly, and she wears a red heart-shaped ring. The background continues to show stacks of products. (3) She gestures toward a price tag hanging from the shelf above her, pointing with her index finger. Her facial expression remains very animated with a wide grin. (4) She holds the cans out to her sides and gives a thumbs-up gesture. The lighting is uniform and bright throughout the scene.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 終於等到. (2) [Subtitle]: 終於又特價了. (3) [Subtitle]: 這真的好久好久才會特價一次. (4) [Subtitle]: 所以你看到喜歡的人一定要囤. (5) [Subtitle]: 因為它就是好事多外面熱食部的. (6) [Subtitle]: 真的很濃湯. (7) [Subtitle]: 很好喝. (8) [Subtitle]: 你可以直接把它煮滾. (9) [Subtitle]: 或是加牛奶都可以. (10) [Subtitle]: 原本355元. [Variety]: 折了80塊 275元. (11) [Subtitle]: 所以一罐只要137元. (12) [Subtitle]: 如果你愛喝這個濃湯的話. (13) [Subtitle]: 自己買來煮真的很划算唷. (14) [Subtitle]: 沒錯 而且這一大罐啊 可以四個人份. (15) [Subtitle]: 超好喝 配三明治麵包 OH MY GOD. (16) [Variety]: 折80元 真的很感. (17) [Subtitle]: 冷冷的冬天 濃濃的湯. (18) [Subtitle]: 然後又可以放很久 這罐子. (19) [Subtitle]: 它的料真的超多. (20) [Variety]: 可以撐到下一次世界大戰為止. (21) [Subtitle]: 趕快來買.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 blurred passerby in the background
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young female wearing a red bucket hat with a logo, a white long-sleeved shirt, and a black fuzzy vest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco warehouse aisles with metal shelving, stacked with bulk quantities of Campbell's Clam Chowder and other canned goods. Large yellow and white price tags are visible on the shelving edges.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female vocals enter with a high pitch and rapid speech rate, expressing excitement. A mid-tempo electronic pop BGM with a strong, playful beat plays steadily in the background. The acoustic environment has a slight indoor room tone but is mostly clean. (2) Short, bubbly synthesizer SFX play synchronously with appearing text overlays. The speaker's tone is consistently animated and persuasive, with frequent rising intonations. BGM continues without interruption. (3) Subtle metallic clinking sounds are heard as the speaker adjusts the cans in her hands. The vocal delivery remains high-arousal and positive. The BGM maintains a constant volume level beneath the speech. (4) The speaker's intensity increases as she discusses the price savings. Final phrases are delivered with high confidence and a concluding vocal flourish. A final digital "pop" SFX marks the end of the information sequence.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Feature Intro -> Cooking Tip -> Price Promotion -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The creator is enthusiastically promoting a price discount for Campbell's Clam Chowder at Costco. By emphasizing the rarity of the sale and the cost-per-can value, she aims to persuade viewers to visit the store and stock up on the product.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of the product, physical presence at the retailer, and verbal encouragement to purchase based on a specific discount.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Typical social-media retail promotion using high-energy performance and variety-show editing to maximize conversion.
